title: CAMPS - 211info
text: EUGENE FAMILY YMCA CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps. Activities include swimming, hiking, arts, crafts, and team sports. 600 E 24th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Most activities are for ages 3-18 years old Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 686-9622 - . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 686-9622 Contact Name: Holly Kriz-Anderson [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by program, scholarships available DOCUMENTS: ID required AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-7pm Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - LIVESTRONG AT THE YMCA HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - YMCA'S DIABETES PREVENTION PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - U CAN GYM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE FAMILY YMCA
